planSpec.content:
# Feature Specification: Independent Running Agents Polling

## 1. Problem Statement

The Running Agents panel currently only updates when the board project is changed, creating a dependency between the board view and the running agents display. Users need to see real-time status of all running agents across all projects without having to manually switch projects or refresh the board.

## 2. User Story

As a **developer using DMaker**, I want **the Running Agents panel to independently poll and update the status of all running agents across all projects**, so that **I can monitor agent progress without needing to interact with the board or change projects**.

## 3. Acceptance Criteria

**Happy Path:**
- GIVEN the Running Agents panel is visible, WHEN agents are running in any project, THEN the panel displays all running agents from all projects
- GIVEN agents are running, WHEN 30 seconds elapse, THEN the panel automatically refreshes the agent status without user interaction
- GIVEN an agent completes its task, WHEN the next poll occurs, THEN the agent is removed from the running agents list

**Edge Cases:**
- GIVEN no projects have running agents, WHEN the poll occurs, THEN the panel shows an empty state
- GIVEN the board project changes, WHEN the change occurs, THEN the Running Agents panel continues to show agents from ALL projects, not just the selected one
- GIVEN multiple projects have running agents, WHEN viewing the panel, THEN agents are grouped by project

**Error Handling:**
- GIVEN network connectivity issues, WHEN polling fails, THEN the panel retains the last known state and retries on next interval
- GIVEN a project is deleted while agents are displayed, WHEN the next poll occurs, THEN stale agents are gracefully removed

## 4. Technical Context

| Aspect | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Affected Files | `apps/ui/src/hooks/use-running-agents.ts`, `apps/ui/src/components/layout/running-agents-indicator.tsx`, `apps/ui/src/store/app-store.ts` |
| Dependencies | React Query (TanStack Query) for polling, existing API client |
| Constraints | Must not overload server with excessive requests; 30-second interval is the minimum |
| Patterns to Follow | Existing hook patterns in `apps/ui/src/hooks/`, React Query polling patterns |

## 5. Non-Goals

- This feature does NOT change how the board view refreshes or operates
- This feature does NOT add new server endpoints (uses existing agent status endpoints)
- This feature does NOT add persistent storage for running agent history
- This feature does NOT implement real-time WebSocket updates (uses polling as specified)

## 6. Implementation Tasks

```tasks
## Phase 1: Foundation - Create Independent Polling Hook

- [ ] T001: Create independent useRunningAgentsPolling hook with 30-second interval | File: apps/ui/src/hooks/use-running-agents.ts
- [ ] T002: Add running agents state to app store that is independent of board state | File: apps/ui/src/store/app-store.ts

## Phase 2: Core Implementation - Update Components

- [ ] T003: Update RunningAgentsIndicator to use new polling hook | File: apps/ui/src/components/layout/running-agents-indicator.tsx
- [ ] T004: Update RunningAgentsPanel to fetch from all projects independently | File: apps/ui/src/components/views/board-view/components/running-agents-panel.tsx

## Phase 3: Integration & Testing

- [ ] T005: Remove board-project dependency from running agents data flow | File: apps/ui/src/components/views/board-view.tsx
- [ ] T006: Verify polling continues when board project changes | File: apps/ui/src/hooks/use-running-agents.ts
```

## 7. Success Metrics

- Running Agents panel updates every 30 seconds without user interaction
- Changing the board project does not reset or interrupt the running agents display
- All running agents from all projects are visible regardless of which project is selected in the board
- No duplicate API calls or race conditions during polling

## 8. Risks & Mitigations

| Risk | Mitigation |
|------|------------|
| Excessive API calls with many projects | Batch project status checks into single API call if possible, or stagger requests |
| Stale data if polling fails | Implement retry logic with exponential backoff, show last-known state with "stale" indicator |
| Memory leaks from polling interval | Properly cleanup intervals on component unmount using React Query's built-in cleanup |

---
